non_blocking_risks.risk: If override-policy.json is changed after export generation, exported outputs must be regenerated.

same_source_consistency.evidence: The weighted ranking, override boundary, and export targets all refer to the same route-selection object.

cross_format_consistency.evidence: The XML and bundle exports serialize the same final authority boundary already declared in mode-resolution.json.

fact_validation_chain.item: Confirm candidate routes exist in branch-plan.json.
Confirm the ranking is bound to stable candidate ids rather than display order or example numbering.
Confirm override boundary exists in override-policy.json.
Confirm exported outputs occur after final authority is known.

unverifiable_assumptions.item: The human override policy will remain stable for the current round after export generation.

check.note: decision-weighting.json exists and has a stable ranking result.
override-policy.json exists and defines override priority.
xml-rewrite.xml and representation-bundle.json exist and remain downstream-only.

scope_alignment_checks.item: No runtime/provider/governance operations extension artifact was required for this round.

check.note: mode-resolution.json includes required cross-mode declaration fields.
override and export artifacts are both present and cross-mode interaction was reviewed.

dispatch_recommendations.item: Proceed because ranking, override, and serialization boundaries are all explicit and coherent.

check.why: It is not the final authority, but it is the pivot artifact that governance and export depend on.
check.evidence: override-policy.json and representation-bundle.json both consume its result indirectly.

check.why: Without it, the final authority boundary is not explicit once human review is in scope.
check.evidence: mode-resolution.json marks governance as higher precedence than weighting for final route selection.

evaluation_report.score_reason: The example is structurally complete, but still demonstrates only one multi-mode interaction pattern rather than a full catalog.
